## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `php -l` on all changed PHP files (no syntax errors)
- [ ] Code follows the existing style (strict types, typed signatures, `final` classes)
- [ ] State-changing forms include a CSRF token
- [ ] SQL uses prepared statements and output is escaped
- [ ] I updated documentation / CHANGELOG where relevant
